variants.engine: Continental C-85-12 or C-85-12F (See Items 105, 107 and 109 for optional engines)
variants.control_surfaces:
Elevator                Up 20°         Down 20°
Elevator tab            Up 6°          Down 33°
Rudder                  Left 16°       Right 16°
Aileron                 Up 22°         Down 14°
Flaps                                  Down 40°
Stabilizer              Fixed

Serial Nos. Eligible           8001 and up

Required Equipment             In addition to the pertinent required basic equipment specified in CAR 4a, the following
items of equipment must be installed:
(Landplane) : Items 1, 201(a), 202(a), 403, 601
(Seaplane) : Items 2, 206(a), 403, 601
(Skiplane) : Items 1, 202, 204, 403, 601
